# GitHub Copilot Project Instructions

The conventions for this project are defined in `AGENTS.md` at the repo root.
Please read and apply all rules in that file before generating any code.

Key reminders for this workshop context:
- All data is synthetic — no real customer data ever enters this repo.
- Use `df_` prefix for all DataFrames.
- Accept file paths as function parameters, never hard-code them.
- Always plan before generating: if asked to solve a data problem, describe
  your step-by-step approach before writing any code.
